entries.title: Harbor Bargain Offer
entries.trigger: A validated Harbor bargain becomes publicly available while its private or public terms remain on the authorized surface.
entries.purpose: Announce that a precise supernatural transaction is available without exposing its private cost or implying acceptance.
layers: Water withdrawing into a contained shape
Cloudy glass or brass term marker
sonic_requirements: Sounds contractual rather than predatory chaos
Does not reveal the bargain's private cost
Ends unresolved because no choice has committed
Profile changes alter texture rather than loudness

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Reduce water and glass transients while retaining the unresolved contractual sequence.

generator_guidance.prompt: Original Harbor bargain offer cue for a drowned storybook town: water withdraws into a precise contained shape, cloudy glass and oxidized brass mark a term, swollen paper acknowledges the offer, and the sound ends unresolved before any choice commits; elegant, exact, supernatural, no speech, no music, no villain sting.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: acceptance cue, spoken terms, demon voice, cash register, villain fanfare, hidden objective clue, jump scare, musical sting, comedy
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: Harbor bargains sound precise, contractual, and materially connected to water, glass, brass, and records rather than generically evil.

entries.approval_boundary: Signature transition brief only; no final bargain terms, privacy behavior, mix, implementation, or production approval.

entries.title: Harbor Bargain Accepted
entries.trigger: A Harbor bargain acceptance commits and its authorized public consequence becomes active.
entries.purpose: Confirm a completed transaction without exposing unrevealed private terms or implying that the bargain was beneficial.
sonic_requirements: Clearly distinct from an offer or refusal
No private cost is sonically encoded
The result feels binding rather than triumphant
Supports a later related debt-collection cue

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Compress the term-lock transient and debt resonance while preserving committed closure.

generator_guidance.prompt: Original Harbor bargain acceptance cue: contained black water closes like a precise seal, oxidized brass and cloudy glass lock one term into place, a swollen ledger confirms the transaction, and a restrained debt resonance remains; binding and morally uncertain, no speech, no music, no victory.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: victory cue, spoken cost, cash register, demon laugh, musical cadence, automatic transformation, villain fanfare, jump scare
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: Accepted bargains close a precise water-glass-brass-record transaction and leave a recognizable debt resonance without revealing private terms.

required_record: relationship to offer and debt cues

entries.approval_boundary: Signature transition brief only; no final bargain consequence, privacy behavior, mix, implementation, or production approval.

entries.title: Harbor Bargain Refused
entries.trigger: A Harbor bargain refusal commits and no bargain effect is applied.
entries.purpose: Confirm refusal without sounding like a reward, punishment, or future retaliation guarantee.
layers: Unlocked brass or glass term marker
sonic_requirements: Refusal is unmistakable but not celebratory
No cost or benefit is applied
No future punishment is promised
Short enough to preserve decision flow

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Preserve the release-and-withdrawal sequence with reduced transient contrast.

generator_guidance.prompt: Short original Harbor bargain refusal cue: a contained water shape relaxes, an unlocked cloudy-glass and brass term marker settles, swollen paper returns to rest, and the offer withdraws neutrally; no benefit, no punishment, no speech, no music, restrained storybook maritime horror.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: success fanfare, punishment sting, angry monster, spoken threat, debt cue, musical cadence, jump scare, comedy
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: A refused bargain releases the same precise materials without locking a term or creating a debt.

entries.approval_boundary: Signature transition brief only; no final refusal behavior, mix, implementation, or production approval.

entries.title: Harbor Debt Collection
entries.trigger: A previously accepted Harbor debt reaches an authorized public collection event.
entries.purpose: Connect a visible public consequence to the bargain family without exposing unrevealed private terms or inventing additional costs.
sonic_requirements: Recognizably related to DH-AUD-TRN-005
Narrates only the public consequence
Does not add a second ungoverned punishment
Profile intensity changes physical texture rather than peak loudness

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Compress collection impact and water-return peaks while preserving the recognized debt motif and completed account.

generator_guidance.prompt: Original Harbor debt collection cue related to an earlier bargain acceptance: the same restrained debt resonance returns, black water arrives under load, cloudy glass and oxidized brass unlock the recorded term, one public consequence commits, and the account closes; exact and inevitable, no speech, no music, no extra punishment.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: spoken private term, revenge sting, villain laugh, extra impact, musical payoff, hidden target clue, jump scare, comedy
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: Debt collection resolves the exact previously accepted water-glass-brass-record transaction and nothing more.

entries.approval_boundary: Signature transition brief only; no final debt behavior, private-state meaning, mix, implementation, or production approval.

entries.title: Bell-Witness Activation
entries.trigger: A defeated stable seat completes the public Bell-Witness continuation transition.
entries.purpose: Confirm that the seat remains active through the bell-warning form rather than presenting defeat as removal.
layers: Rope or index movement without a full strike
sonic_requirements: Transition ends with active agency rather than mourning
Clearly belongs to Bellhouse family
No private objective is encoded
Profile variants change physical defeat texture only

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Reduce bodily and harmonic peaks while retaining the seat-to-warning-form completion.

generator_guidance.prompt: Original Bell-Witness continuation cue: a defeated body's weight settles, the oxidized Bellhouse harmonic accepts the stable seat without a full strike, rope and index marks move, and an active warning-form resonance remains; purposeful afterlife agency, no funeral music, no speech, no elimination cue.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: funeral bell, player elimination, ghost choir, spoken warning, victory sting, hidden objective clue, sad music, jump scare
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: A Bell-Witness continues through the Bellhouse warning mechanism; defeat changes available actions but does not remove the seat.

entries.approval_boundary: Signature continuation brief only; no final afterlife mechanics, content intensity, mix, implementation, or production approval.

entries.title: Drowned Guide Activation
entries.trigger: A defeated stable seat completes the public Drowned Guide continuation transition.
entries.purpose: Confirm that the seat remains active through submerged-route authority without using generic ghost or drowning audio.
sonic_requirements: Ends with navigational agency
No intelligible drowned speech
Does not promise a route is open until visible state confirms it
Profile variants alter body texture rather than mechanics

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Reduce water and body peaks while preserving submerged-route and active-form completion.

generator_guidance.prompt: Original Drowned Guide continuation cue: a defeated stable seat settles into black water, an impossible submerged route begins to resonate, doubled footsteps or directional current emerge, and an active guide-form presence remains; purposeful and navigational, no drowning scream, no speech, no music, no elimination cue.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: ghost wail, drowning scream, player elimination, whale song, spoken guide, automatic route opening, music, jump scare
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: A Drowned Guide continues by manipulating submerged memory routes; defeat changes movement authority but preserves stable-seat agency.

required_record: water, footsteps, and body source provenance

entries.approval_boundary: Signature continuation brief only; no final afterlife mechanics, route behavior, mix, implementation, or production approval.

entries.title: Lighthouse Guardian Activation
entries.trigger: A defeated stable seat completes the public Lighthouse Guardian continuation transition.
entries.purpose: Confirm that the seat remains active through lighthouse protection and sacrifice authority.
layers: Final body or shadow contact near the mechanism
Brass index accepting a new guardian position
sonic_requirements: Transition ends with protective agency
Belongs to lighthouse lens family
Does not imply an automatic sacrifice
No private ending objective is encoded

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Reduce glass and brass peaks while preserving guardian-position acceptance and active protection.

generator_guidance.prompt: Original Lighthouse Guardian continuation cue: a defeated stable seat's body or shadow contacts the memory-guidance mechanism, cloudy cracked glass accepts an imprint, oxidized brass indexes a guardian position, and a restrained active protective resonance remains; purposeful afterlife agency, no choir, no speech, no music, no automatic sacrifice.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: angelic choir, player elimination, automatic sacrifice, superhero transformation, spoken oath, music, heavenly glow sound, jump scare
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: A Lighthouse Guardian continues through the lens and brass indexing mechanism, preserving final choices without automatically spending its sacrifice.

required_record: glass, brass, body, and shadow source provenance

entries.approval_boundary: Signature continuation brief only; no final afterlife mechanics, sacrifice behavior, mix, implementation, or production approval.

entries.title: Lifeboat Breaks Free
entries.trigger: The public lifeboat mooring fails or releases through the authored break-free hazard.
entries.purpose: Communicate that the boat is moving away and requires a visible response without implying permanent loss before resolution.
layers: Current beginning to carry the craft
sonic_requirements: Clearly distinct from an intentional launch
Does not imply the boat is permanently lost
Response window remains readable
Direction may support but not replace visible route information

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Compress mooring release and dock impacts while preserving unintended movement and recoverable distance.

generator_guidance.prompt: Original small lifeboat break-free hazard: salt-stiff mooring strains and releases unexpectedly, swollen wooden hull shifts, wet dock and ramp respond, current begins carrying the craft away, recoverable but urgent, no destruction, no engine, no voices, no music.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: boat destruction, permanent loss, automatic escape, motorboat, shouting, music, victory cue, giant wave, comedy
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: The lifeboat is a recoverable small craft whose rope, hull, dock, and current state remain mechanically honest.

required_record: rope, hull, dock, and water source licenses

entries.approval_boundary: Hazard SFX brief only; no final response window, route result, mix, implementation, or production approval.

entries.title: Bell Marks a Living Seat
entries.trigger: The bell publicly applies a visible danger mark to one eligible stable seat.
entries.purpose: Support the public mark and preparation window without sounding like an immediate death sentence.
sonic_requirements: Danger is clear but not equivalent to defeat
No hidden cause is exposed
The seat remains able to prepare or respond
Profile variants alter threat texture without increasing peak loudness

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Reduce warning transient and tail contrast while preserving the public mark and unresolved preparation window.

generator_guidance.prompt: Original public Bellhouse warning cue when a visible stable seat receives a danger mark: a contained oxidized-bell harmonic, swollen ledger index, and unresolved preparation-window resonance; serious but not a death knell, no speech, no music, no hidden attacker, no jump-scare loudness.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: death knell, player elimination, hidden attacker cue, spoken seat name, jump scare, music, villain sting, automatic defeat
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: A public bell mark increases danger pressure and preparation urgency without guaranteeing the seat's defeat.

entries.approval_boundary: Signature warning brief only; no final targeting, hazard timing, mix, implementation, or production approval.

entries.title: Stable Seat Human Departure
entries.trigger: A human controller intentionally leaves or disconnects from a stable seat and the reconnect grace state begins.
entries.purpose: Acknowledge a control-source change without sounding like defeat, punishment, seat removal, or a supernatural event.
sonic_requirements: Calm and nonpunitive
Distinct from defeat or seat deletion
Short enough for repeated online or local continuity events
No private seat state is exposed

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Use the same low-contrast neutral control release.

generator_guidance.prompt: Very short neutral system sound for a human controller leaving a persistent stable seat: soft control release while the seat identity tone remains, calm, nonpunitive, not a defeat or deletion, no speech, no music, no alarm.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: failure buzzer, defeat sting, disconnect alarm, supernatural effect, speech, music, seat deletion, punishment
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: Seat-control cues are calm, brief, neutral, and preserve the stable seat rather than dramatizing connection changes.

entries.approval_boundary: System-cue brief only; no final seat lifecycle, UI, mix, implementation, or production approval.

entries.title: Stable Seat Surrogate Activation
entries.trigger: The reconnect grace period ends or an authorized action activates deterministic game control for a stable seat.
entries.purpose: Confirm game control without implying that the seat, character, objectives, inventory, or faction were reset.
sonic_requirements: Clearly related to departure and takeover cues
No robot or AI personality implication
No reset or replacement implication
No private state is exposed

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Use the same low-contrast stable-seat and control-engagement sequence.

generator_guidance.prompt: Very short neutral system sound for deterministic game control engaging on an existing stable seat: the seat identity tone remains and a soft control-engagement layer joins it, calm, nonrobotic, no reset, no replacement, no speech, no music.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: robot beep, hostile AI, reset sound, character replacement, speech, music, alarm, science fiction
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: Seat-control cues preserve the same stable-seat identity while only the controller source changes.

entries.approval_boundary: System-cue brief only; no final surrogate behavior, AI identity, UI, mix, implementation, or production approval.

entries.title: Stable Seat Human Takeover
entries.trigger: A validated human authority transfer commits at a safe handoff for a game-controlled stable seat.
entries.purpose: Confirm that a human now controls the unchanged seat state without sounding like a new character spawn or reward.
sonic_requirements: No state reset implication
No spawn or reward implication
Related to surrogate activation but clearly a human handoff
No private inherited state is exposed

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Use the same low-contrast seat-identity and handoff-completion sequence.

generator_guidance.prompt: Very short neutral system sound for a human taking control of an unchanged persistent stable seat at a safe handoff: the seat identity tone remains and a soft human-control completion joins it, no spawn, no reward, no reset, no speech, no music.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: level up, respawn, character select, victory, reset, speech, music, private role clue, alarm
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: Human takeover changes controller authority only; the stable seat's history, injuries, inventory, role, faction, and objectives remain.

entries.approval_boundary: System-cue brief only; no final takeover flow, private handoff, UI, mix, implementation, or production approval.

entries.title: Reserved Player Return
entries.trigger: A returning player reclaims the same reserved stable seat at a safe handoff.
entries.purpose: Confirm return to the evolved seat without implying rollback, healing, item restoration, or objective reset.
sonic_requirements: Related to takeover but recognizably returns to the same seat
No rollback or restoration implication
No private recap information is encoded
Calm and nonpunitive

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Use the same low-contrast identity, return, and completion sequence.

generator_guidance.prompt: Very short neutral system sound for a returning player reclaiming the same evolved stable seat: the existing seat identity tone is recognized, a restrained return cadence answers it, and control completes; no rewind, no healing, no reward, no reset, no speech, no music.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: rewind, healing, inventory reward, objective reset, respawn, speech, music, victory, alarm
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: Returning players reclaim the same stable seat exactly as it evolved while game-controlled; no gameplay state rolls back.

entries.approval_boundary: System-cue brief only; no final reconnect policy, private recap, UI, mix, implementation, or production approval.

entries.title: Spectator Enters Public View
entries.trigger: An approved remote requester enters spectator mode with public-only access.
entries.purpose: Acknowledge public observation without implying player authority, seat assignment, or private access.
sonic_requirements: Neutral and unobtrusive
No seat authority implication
No private-view cue
May be disabled or grouped when several spectators join

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Use the same low-level observer and public-boundary cue.

generator_guidance.prompt: Very short unobtrusive system sound for an approved spectator entering a public-only game view: soft observer presence and a clear public-boundary closure, no seat authority, no private access, no speech, no music, suitable for grouping or disabling.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: player spawn, applause, seat selection, private access, speech, music, victory, alarm, social-media notification
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: Spectators observe only the authorized public projection and do not receive stable-seat authority or private information.

entries.approval_boundary: System-cue brief only; no final spectator policy, UI, networking, mix, implementation, or production approval.

entries.title: Join Request Received
entries.trigger: A compatible remote requester submits a join request for host review.
entries.purpose: Notify the host without granting access, assigning a seat, or disrupting active Tale audio.
sonic_requirements: Clearly lower priority than gameplay warnings
May be suppressed during critical decisions
No approval or access implication
Multiple requests may group without a notification cascade

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Use the same low-level bounded request cue.

generator_guidance.prompt: Subtle short system sound for a remote join request entering a host review queue: one bounded neutral request cue, lower priority than gameplay, no access granted, no seat assignment, no phone-notification imitation, no speech, no music.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: doorbell, phone notification, access granted, player spawn, alarm, speech, music, social-media chime, victory
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: Admission cues communicate queue and authority state without granting seats, rooms, spectator access, or private information.

entries.approval_boundary: System-cue brief only; no final admission policy, networking, UI, mix, implementation, or production approval.

entries.title: Public Ending Punctuation Family
entries.trigger: A public ending family and its visible authoritative result have committed.
entries.purpose: Provide short material-based punctuation for public ending families without acting as a musical score or collapsing mixed seat outcomes into one universal victory or defeat.
layers: Ending-specific bell, lens, water, archive, or lifeboat mechanism
Space for seat and faction attribution
sonic_requirements: Separate variants for sealed, released, escaped, risen, propagated, erased, and mixed outcomes
No variant substitutes for seat-by-seat or faction attribution
No final score or melody is established in P0.4
Mixed outcomes remain morally and mechanically plural

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Compress ending transients while preserving each mechanism family and leaving room for authoritative attribution.

generator_guidance.prompt: Family of short original nonmusical ending punctuation cues for Drowned Harbor: distinct material resolutions built from bell, lighthouse lens, water, archive records, lifeboat, rope, and Harbor signal; variants for sealed, released, escaped, risen, propagated, erased, and mixed outcomes; leave space for seat attribution, no universal victory or defeat, no score, no speech.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: victory fanfare, defeat sting, musical theme, credits music, spoken summary, hidden outcome, choir, trailer ending, universal success
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: Endings resolve through the Tale's existing public mechanisms and preserve separate Living, Restless, Bellmarked, Tidebound, and Harbor outcomes.

entries.approval_boundary: Signature ending-SFX family brief only; no final score, ending attribution, mix, implementation, or production approval.
